title: Peregrinazioni Veneziane
meta: For augmented trombone and Alife · Venice 2021

content.value: Spatialized trombone and electronics. Improvisation over a Venetian traditional song. Grains of sound are delayed, inverted and spatialized using 16 boids controlled with an accelerometer mounted on the trombone.

_comment_paper: To link a research paper, replace null with: {"title": "Paper Title", "url": "papers/filename.pdf"}
